title: Even More Xaero's Minimap Mod Support
description: Xaero's Minimap icons for a few random mods
body:
This resource pack adds icons for a few modded entities that I haven't seen other packs support yet.

**Supported mods:**
- [Habitat](https://modrinth.com/mod/habitat)
- [Spawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/spawn-mod)
- [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- [Sully's Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sullysmod)
